revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "ew pages" to "ew automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:reimport"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style/doc]] [[Category:new automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:reimport]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Soniasjangid2211|Soniasjangid2211]] ([[User talk:Soniasjangid2211|talk]]): Yeah, well, this is a documentation page for a military history module
revision.text:
{{Module rating|protected}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This module is invoked by {{tl|WPMILHIST Infobox style}}; see template documentation for usage.
Used also as a meta-module in [[Module:Military navigation]] in the following manner:
<syntaxhighlight lang='lua'> local styles = mw.loadData('Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style') </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

{{Module rating|protected}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This module is invoked by {{tl|WPMILHIST Infobox style}}; see template documentation for usage.
Used also as a meta-module in [[Module:Military navigation]] in the following manner:
<syntaxhighlight lang='lua'> local styles = mw.loadData('Module:WPMILHIST Infobox style') </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
